ReviewText: The rooms are clean, the area is quiet, and the dorm is within walking distance of campus.
There are many affordable meals, friendly staff, and enough seating during most lunch hours.
The dorm is close to classes, but the shared kitchen and laundry area can become crowded.
It is a convenient option between classes and offers snacks, drinks, and simple rice meals.
The rent is affordable, but some rooms need repairs and the internet connection is unreliable.
The food court has Thai, Indian, Chinese, and vegetarian choices with clear menu labels.
The residence has comfortable rooms and helpful staff, but this review is archived because details may be outdated.
The café is close to the gym, but the original submission did not include enough useful detail for publication.
